{{Quote|Nakaron is ugly, even to the kindest Trandoshan eye. His yellow-green complexion comes from his exposure to the sand storms of Varic ''[…]''<nowiki />|Airen Cracken, ''Wanted by Cracken''|<ref name="Journal4" />}}
'''Varic''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="Journal4" /> situated in the [[Varic system/Legends|Varic system]], a part of the [[Chorlian sector/Legends|Chorlian sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Its climate featured significant [[Sandstorm/Legends|sand storms]], which affected the skin [[Color/Legends|complexion]] of the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Nakaron]] upon his visit to the astronomical object at some point by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The effect of the Varic sand storms on Nakaron was eventually noted by the New Republic [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] in an entry of the [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]''<ref name="Journal4" />—the initial version of which was published in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]<ref name="7 ABY">{{JournalCite|1|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}} establishes that the "[[Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)|Wanted by Cracken]]" segment of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' represents an [[in-universe]] update to the [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]'', the original version of which is presented in the sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]. The latter work is dated to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and since ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates that conflict to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the placement of the sourcebook therefore translates to [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].</ref>—dedicated to the Trandoshan.<ref name="Journal4" />

==Behind the scenes==
Varic was mentioned in the "[[Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)|Wanted by Cracken]]" segment of the [[November]] [[1994]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|fourth issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''. The segment was authored by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]].<ref name="Journal4" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Varic [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Varic itself, in grid square S-4.<ref name="TEA" />
